ruleDirs.title: Rule directories
ruleDirs.description: A list of string instructing where to discover ast-grep's YAML rules.

testConfigs.title: Test configurations
testConfigs.description: A list of object to configure ast-grep's test cases. Each object can have two fields.

utilDirs.title: Utility directories
utilDirs.description: A list of string instructing where to discover ast-grep's global utility rules.

languageGlobs.description: A mapping to associate a language to files that have non-standard extensions or syntaxes.

customLanguages.description: A dictionary of custom languages in the project.

languageInjections.description: A list of language injections to support embedded languages in the project like JS/CSS in HTML. This is an experimental feature.

testDir.description: A string specifies where to discover test cases for ast-grep.

snapshotDir.description: A string path relative to testDir that specifies where to store test snapshots for ast-grep. You can think it like __snapshots___ in popular test framework like jest. If this option is not specified, ast-grep will store the snapshot under the __snapshots__ folder under the testDir.

libraryPath.description: The path to the tree-sitter dynamic library of the language.

extensions.description: The file extensions for this language.

expandoChar.description: An optional char to replace $ in your pattern.

languageSymbol.description: The dylib symbol to load ts-language, default is tree_sitter_{name}

LanguageInjection.description: A list of language injections to support embedded languages in the project like JS/CSS in HTML. This is an experimental feature.

hostLanguage.description: The host language name, e.g. html. This is the language of documents that contains the embedded language code.

rule.description: Defines the ast-grep rule to identify the injected language region within the host language documents.
